content.speakerText: Alright, to recap—we’re cutting print by 30%, keeping local inserts, Alex handles social by Fri, and Jamie owns the Q3 report. Sound good?
content.speakerTextCn: 好了，总结一下：印刷广告减30%，保留地方简报，Alex周五前搞定社交媒体，Jamie负责Q3报告。大家同意吗？

options.text: That sounds great! I'll send out the minutes by EOD.
I think we should restart the whole meeting.
Can we delay the deadline until next month?
I don’t understand any of this. Can you explain again?

content.explanation: 正确答案回应了总结并主动承诺行动，符合会议收尾时积极、协作的语境。干扰项：B 选项提议重开会议，不合时宜；C 选项要求延期，与‘已达成共识’冲突；D 选项表达困惑，不适合在收尾阶段提出，显得缺乏参与感。

content.speakerText: Thanks, everyone—your input really helped shape this plan.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢大家，你们的建议对完善计划帮助很大。

options.text: You're welcome. I’m happy to help next time too.
Can we talk about next week’s agenda now?
I’m tired. Let’s end this meeting.

content.explanation: 正确答案礼貌回应感谢并表达持续合作意愿，符合职场礼仪。干扰项：B 否认贡献，显得消极；C 提前跳到下个议题，打断收尾节奏；D 表达疲惫，语气粗鲁，不适合正式会议场景。

content.speakerText: Before we wrap up, let’s confirm the action items: Sarah to draft the email by Tuesday, Mark to schedule the next meeting, and everyone to review the budget draft.
content.speakerTextCn: 在结束前，我们确认一下行动项：Sarah 周二前起草邮件，Mark 安排下次会议，大家审阅预算草案。

options.text: Got it. I’ll review the budget draft by Monday and let you know if I have feedback.
I’m not sure I can do that—I’m busy next week.
Who’s responsible for the budget again?
Can we skip the budget review this time?

content.explanation: 正确答案确认任务并承诺时限，体现责任感和主动性。干扰项：B 和 D 拒绝任务，不符合团队协作精神；C 重复确认，表明未专注倾听，不适合收尾阶段。

content.template: Alright, to recap—we’re cutting print by 30%, keeping local inserts, Alex handles social by Fri, and Jamie owns the Q3 report. Sound ___?
content.hint: 这是会议收尾时常用的确认句型，表示‘大家同意吗？’
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：Sound good?（确认共识）

content.template: Thanks, everyone—your input really helped ___ this plan.
content.hint: ‘shape’ 在此表示‘塑造、完善’，是职场中描述贡献的常用动词
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：help shape a plan（帮助完善计划）

content.template: Before we wrap up, I’ll ___ the action items in the shared document.
content.hint: 在会议结束前，通常需要更新任务清单以确保责任明确
content.knowledgePoint: 职场高频动词搭配：update action items（更新行动项）

content.speakerText: Alright, to recap—we’re cutting print by 30%, keeping local inserts, Alex handles social by Fri, and Jamie owns the Q3 report. Sound good?
content.speakerTextCn: 好了，总结一下：印刷广告减30%，保留地方简报，Alex周五前搞定社交媒体，Jamie负责Q3报告。大家同意吗？
expectedAnswers: Sounds good to me. I'll make sure my team is aligned.
Perfect—thanks for clarifying. I’ll update the tracker right away.
Just one thing—can we add a mid-week check-in to track progress?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达同意或提出合理补充
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合职场口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'update', 'track', 'check-in' 等会议收尾关键词

content.speakerText: Thanks, everyone—your input really helped shape this plan.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢大家，你们的建议对完善计划帮助很大。
expectedAnswers: No problem—I’m glad we could align on this.
Thanks for leading this, Sarah! You made it really efficient.
See you Monday—looking forward to the next steps.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应感谢并体现团队意识
语言准确性：是否使用了恰当的感谢回应句型
表达自然度：是否避免生硬或过度随意的表达
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'align', 'leading', 'next steps' 等职场关键词

content.speakerText: We’re wrapping up the meeting—any final thoughts before we close?
content.speakerTextCn: 会议即将结束，大家还有最后的想法吗？
expectedAnswers: No, I think we covered everything. Thanks for organizing!
Just one quick note: can we add the client feedback to the report template?
All good from my side. Have a great weekend, everyone!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否提供有效反馈或明确表示无异议
语言准确性：是否使用完整句子，避免碎片化表达
表达自然度：是否符合会议收尾时的礼貌与简洁风格
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'wrap up', 'final thoughts', 'closing', 'thanks for organizing' 等收尾表达
